cursor.standing: Open edge (a) closed — VALIDATIONS are now PERSISTED to beside-code git-JSON (validation_store.py: a validations/<stem>.json beside the proofs each seals, Law 5), NOT db_domain; run_proof still writes nothing and the append-only store refuses a drifted record.

window.standing: Born as the third step of the code spine (base -> base pair -> tester), the first real device — the system's notary that runs a proof as a subprocess and produces an eight-field VALIDATION whose verdict comes from the subject's exit code, not granted.

Same day grew its other half — the kernel-owned network's MEASURED seal (isolation.py) — completing the 'tester + kernel-owned network' spine step's no-route half; proven green with no install, the hollow-tester and hollow-seal killers verified by falsification.

Open edge (a) closed — VALIDATIONS are now PERSISTED to beside-code git-JSON (validation_store.py: a validations/<stem>.json beside the proofs each seals, Law 5), NOT db_domain; run_proof still writes nothing and the append-only store refuses a drifted record.
